channel.title: WPA Journal of Protocol & Diplomacy
channel.description: Independent institutional journal of World Protocol Academy: protocol, diplomacy, public communication, security studies and communicology.

item.title: WPA Journal — Inaugural Issue (Vol. 1, No. 1) — Forthcoming
item.description: Inaugural issue — forthcoming. Planned publication: September 2026. ISSN/DOI pending official assignment.

item.title: WPA Journal — Charter and Author Information
item.description: Journal identity, aims and scope, author guidelines, submission and editorial policy.
